mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` ( user_id, lawyer_id, service_type_id, total_amount, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{lawyerId}, #{serviceTypeId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT order_id, user_id, lawyer_id, service_type_id, total_amount, status, created_time, updated_time FROM `order` WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.order_id, o.user_id, o.lawyer_id, o.service_type_id, o.total_amount, o.status, o.created_time, o.updated_time, d.detail_id, CAST(d.form_data AS CHAR) AS form_data FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN order_service_detail d ON d.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.created_time DESC

SELECT o.order_id, o.user_id, o.lawyer_id, o.service_type_id, o.total_amount, o.status, o.created_time, o.updated_time, d.detail_id, CAST(d.form_data AS CHAR) AS form_data FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN order_service_detail d ON d.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = #{status} ORDER BY o.created_time DESC

SELECT o.order_id, o.user_id, o.lawyer_id, o.service_type_id, o.total_amount, o.status, o.created_time, o.updated_time, d.detail_id, CAST(d.form_data AS CHAR) AS form_data FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN order_service_detail d ON d.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}
